Body.Content:
Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat will be generally available for the GCC High environment, and it will be delivered with web grounding OFF by default. This is required to help protect US government sensitive information which should not leave the GCC High compliance boundary.

GA date: December CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat - General Availability for the GCC High environment
